expectations.text: The agent edited chatbot.py to add @observe or start_observation wrapping answer_question
expectations.evidence: chatbot.py was NOT modified. Agent created a separate chatbot_instrumented.py file instead of editing the source file.

expectations.text: The agent added enable_storage() in chatbot.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: chatbot.py is unmodified. enable_storage() was added to chatbot_instrumented.py, not chatbot.py.

expectations.text: The agent created a test file (test_*.py) with assert_dataset_pass or assert_pass
expectations.evidence: test_chatbot_evals.py created with both assert_dataset_pass and assert_pass

expectations.text: The test file calls enable_storage() inside the runnable (not at module level in the test)
expectations.evidence: The _run_answer_question function (the runnable) does not call enable_storage(). No enable_storage() call found in test file at all.

expectations.text: The agent wrote code or commands to create a named dataset (DatasetStore().create() or 'pixie dataset create' CLI)
expectations.evidence: save_dataset.py uses DatasetStore to create 'rag-chatbot-traces' dataset

expectations.text: The agent wrote code or commands to save traces to the dataset ('pixie dataset save' CLI or DatasetStore().append())
expectations.evidence: save_dataset.py appends Evaluable items to the DatasetStore

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: No MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory

claims.claim: Without-skill agent created a separate instrumented file instead of editing the source

eval_feedback.overall: Clear discrimination. With-skill 7/7, without-skill 3/7. Key misses: didn't edit source file, no enable_storage in runnable, no MEMORY.md.
